# qsl differential-testing fixture: command stream + events + rejections + snapshot
version 1
meta seed 41 symbols 3 orders 120 max_qty 20 max_notional 1000
cmd reg S0
cmd reg S1
cmd reg S2
cmd market 3 1 S 8
reject new_market 1 UnknownSymbol

reject modify 2 UnknownOrder
